title: interface headset
wikitext:
[]: interface headset             Quote Post by Deepak » Sun Sep 25, 2011 8:10 am I have some problems with this page on the wiki. It can be just added to a page about pilot gear. Does anybody know how to merge pages to accomplish this? In addition what is this about an A10 nerve. Some people say the information is in the Red Cross Book and the movie pamphlet. I have also heard it is in the Neon Genesis Evangelion Platinum: 04 DVD Booklet. Can somebody link me to the literature that mentions this nerve and its supposed relation to the headset? I just want to better understand this because nobody seems to know the truth.

[]: A10... WARTHOG! F*CK YEAH! BD             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Sep 25, 2011 9:16 am These should help: http://www.nervarchives.com/glossary.a10nerve.php http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_sadamoto02.php

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sun Sep 25, 2011 6:18 pm on the nerve archives page it says it got the info from the DVD booklet. does somebody have the booklet so I can see the primary document?

[]: A10, just there. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Sep 25, 2011 9:49 pm Deepak wrote: on the nerve archives page it says it got the info from the DVD booklet. does somebody have the booklet so I can see the primary document?
